name: Arcesium LLC
lede: Arcesium runs two centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Gurugram, covering SSC, built over six years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Arcesium office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Arcesium LLC GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Arcesium runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Gurugram), covering SSC. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Arcesium's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Gurugram, spanning SSC. The centers deliver IT and Finance & Accounting for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all two decision-makers, in one profile.
